meta.name: Summarize RSS feeds into a daily AI digest with Gemini, Slack, and Gmail

parameters.content:
## Daily AI News Digest

### How it works
1. A schedule trigger runs every morning at your chosen time
2. RSS Feed nodes pull latest articles from your configured news sources
3. A Code node merges and deduplicates the articles
4. Google Gemini summarizes each article and assigns an importance score (1-10)
5. Another Code node builds a formatted daily digest sorted by importance
6. The digest is posted to Slack as your morning briefing
7. A copy goes out via Gmail for people who prefer email

### Setup steps
1. Add your RSS feed URLs in each RSS Feed Read node
2. Connect Google Gemini API credentials (free tier)
3. Connect Slack and pick the channel for daily posts
4. Connect Gmail and set the recipient list
5. Adjust the schedule time to match your morning routine

### Customization
- Add more RSS Feed nodes for additional sources
- Change the importance scoring criteria in the AI prompt
- Filter out articles below a certain score in the Code node

## Feed collection
Pulls articles from multiple RSS sources and merges them.

## AI summarization
Gemini reads each article and creates a scored summary.

## Digest delivery
Formats the digest and delivers via Slack and Gmail.
